svg.title: 04 Research Turn Runtime Collaboration: UML sequence with data contracts

g.text: 04 Research Turn Runtime Collaboration: UML sequence with data contracts
Q2 runTurn(userId, conversationId, generationId, message, lockedScope)
sparse BM25 query + active model filter
Java fixes user_id and scope.paper_ids before Python runs.
The harness never expands global paper access.
paper disclosed -> location disclosed -> exact read -> Evidence ID -> accepted submission.
Citeable text is reopened from MySQL by read_locations.
